column1: Chapter 6 - Detail Design Specifications : Report Map (live figures track the workbook)
Insert AFTER Requirements/Assumptions chapter and BEFORE Design Alternatives. Each table needs a caption + an in-text reference (brief requirement).

column4: Daily = ROUNDUP(Annual / Workdays); Takt = Effective time / Daily demand
Tubes/day = Gross sections per day / Sections per 6 m tube
Sheets/day = Gross parts per day / Parts nested per sheet

column3: Table 8: Shift, effective time and takt
column4: Effective time = Shift - Breaks; Takt = Effective / Daily demand
Machines = ROUNDUP((Daily gross x Cycle) / Effective time)   [Tompkins Eq.2.5]
Operators = Machines x Operators per machine (1:1 baseline)
Lines = ROUNDUP(Items/day / (Line rate x Productive hours))

column1: RULE: Everything spreadsheet-derived (6.1-6.5, and later the Ch7 space tables) must precede the Design Alternatives / MFP chapters, because layout decisions depend on these numbers.
